mapper.sql: select scene_id, scene_code, scene_name, business_domain, org_code, scene_type, active_version_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from cost_scene

where.if: and (scene_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or scene_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: order by update_time desc, scene_id desc
order by scene_name asc, scene_id asc

select count(1) as sceneCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledSceneCount, count(distinct case when business_domain is not null and business_domain != '' then business_domain end) as businessDomainCount from cost_scene

select s.scene_id as sceneId, s.scene_code as sceneCode, s.scene_name as sceneName, s.business_domain as businessDomain, s.status as status, s.active_version_id as activeVersionId, (select count(1) from cost_fee_item f where f.scene_id = s.scene_id) as feeCount, (select count(1) from cost_variable_group g where g.scene_id = s.scene_id) as variableGroupCount, (select count(1) from cost_variable v where v.scene_id = s.scene_id) as variableCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = s.scene_id) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_version p where p.scene_id = s.scene_id) as publishedVersionCount from cost_scene s where s.scene_id = #{sceneId}
